case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200027969) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-21-2021. THE MAY-26-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR WALTER CURTIS COOK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-21-2021 THROUGH SEP-19-2021.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66564350) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-14-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-14-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE AT TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 66508838) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PARTIES AGREE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 200041971)
MATTER IS REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION, DISMISSAL ON FILE.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200026685), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED FEB-25-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 66508838) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66508838) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
